query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Fuel excise cuts set to be extended until September
articles.description: The government have reduced excise on petrol and diesel as part of the fuel package announced back in April - it has now been extended into September as the cabinet will finalise measures today

articles.title: Newsom Defends California Gas Tax
articles.description: Gavin Newsom criticizes Trump administration for profiting off high gas prices, defends California's gas tax.

articles.title: Trump Loses It Over Gas Prices in Unhinged Meltdown
articles.description: The president demanded that retailers lower their prices “immediately.”

articles.title: Euro Zone Bond Yields Decline Amid Potential U.S.-Iran Talks
articles.description: Euro zone bond yields slightly decreased as oil prices hovered low, with focus on potential U.S.-Iran talks. Germany's 10- and 2-year bond yields fell 1 basis point each. Brent crude oil declined, while euro zone inflation figures awaited. ECB's monetary policy conference added to market dynamics.

articles.title: Why Delhi's 2028 Petrol Two-Wheeler Ban Is A High-Stakes Move?
articles.description: Delhi EV Policy 2026: Why a complete ban on the registration of petrol two-wheelers from April 1, 2028, makes sense? We explain.

articles.title: Auto demand likely to remain strong, easing crude, aluminium, PGM prices to support margins: Kotak
articles.description: India's automobile sector is likely to remain on a strong footing in the coming quarters, as demand has remained resilient despite the hike in petrol and diesel prices. In addition, easing commodity costs are expected to provide much-needed relief to automakers' profit margins, according to a report by Kotak Institutional Equities.

articles.title: Rupee heads for first quarterly gain in five on cooling oil prices and a policy boost
articles.description: The Indian rupee aims for its first quarterly gain since March 2025, buoyed by falling oil prices and policy support.

articles.title: E20 Petrol Update: Centre tells Supreme Court ethanol blending an experiment, results to be assessed next year
articles.description: E20 Petrol Update: Centre tells Supreme Court ethanol blending an experiment, results to be assessed next year

articles.title: Delhi Petrol Bike Ban Explained: EV Policy 2.0, 2028 Deadline and Should You Buy a Two-Wheeler in 2026?
articles.description: Understand Delhi’s 2026 EV Policy 2.0 and what the petrol bike registration ban from April 2028 means for you. Learn if you should still buy a petrol two-wheeler, the subsidies on electric scooters and bikes, and how existing petrol vehicles are affected.

articles.title: FMCG sector set for strong Q1, lower crude oil prices to boost margins, says Anand Rathi; Marico, HUL among top picks
articles.description: The FMCG sector is expected to see healthy revenue growth in FY27, fueled by innovation and price adjustments. Anand Rathi highlights top picks like Marico and Hindustan Unilever, despite rural demand risks associated with weather conditions impacting the market.
